creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Don't byte-compile emacs-lisp files.

Obtained from: pkgsrc

How-To-Repeat: Run as regular user

$ make install clean
[...]
===>  Returning to user credentials
===>  Cleaning for autoconf-2.68
rm: /usr/ports/devel/autoconf/work/autoconf-2.68/lib/emacs/no/autoconf-mode.el: Permission denied

rm: /usr/ports/devel/autoconf/work/autoconf-2.68/lib/emacs/no/autotest-mode.el: Permission denied
rm: /usr/ports/devel/autoconf/work/autoconf-2.68/lib/emacs/no/autotest-mode.elc: Permission denied
rm: /usr/ports/devel/autoconf/work/autoconf-2.68/lib/emacs/no: Directory not empty
rm: /usr/ports/devel/autoconf/work/autoconf-2.68/lib/emacs: Directory not empty
rm: /usr/ports/devel/autoconf/work/autoconf-2.68/lib: Directory not empty
rm: /usr/ports/devel/autoconf/work/autoconf-2.68: Directory not empty
